---
name: Incident Report (Post-Mortem)
about: Used for documenting production incidents
title: "[INCIDENT] "
labels: incident
assignees: ''
---

## Incident Summary
- **Date & Time:**
- **Duration:**
- **Severity:** (P1/P2/P3)
- **Status:** (Resolved / Monitoring)

## Impact
- What parts of the system were affected?
- How many users were impacted?

## Timeline
- **T0:** (When did it start)
- **T+XX:** (When was it detected)
- **T+XX:** (When was it resolved)

## Root Cause Analysis
Explain technically what failed.

## Action Items
- [ ] What needs fixing immediately?
- [ ] How do we prevent this in the future?
